description: Ethane equilibrium geometry for QM/MM boundary testing
purpose: US-034: FD validation of link atom force projection

geometry.notes: Coordinates in geometry.xyz are approximate equilibrium values. Final geometry should be from actual DFTB+ optimization.

qm_mm_boundary.m1_description: MM boundary carbon, direct bonded partner of QM C0
qm_mm_boundary.m2_description: Hydrogens attached to M1 (used in shift scheme)

charges.reference: Jorgensen et al., J. Am. Chem. Soc. 118, 11225 (1996)
charges.notes: Standard OPLS-AA parameters for sp3 carbon (CT) and aliphatic hydrogen (HC)

us035_test_notes.zero_scheme: Q'_M1 = 0, charge redistributed uniformly to M2 atoms
us035_test_notes.shift_scheme: Q'_M1 = 0, charge redistributed to preserve dipole moment
us035_test_notes.reason: Tests verify algebraic properties (charge/dipole conservation) and FD self-consistency, not comparison to external values
